name: Purple Smoke Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise, sugar, white wine vinegar, oil, garlic powder, onion powder, dry mustard, celery salt, black pepper, lemon juice, half and half, and salt.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated and the mixture is smooth.
3. Pour the dressing over the shredded cabbage in a large bowl.
4. Toss the cabbage gently until it is evenly coated with the dressing.
